days.title: Fly Heathrow to Venice — Arrive Lake Garda

stops.name: Venice Marco Polo Airport (VCE)
stops.detail: Depart LHR 11:50, arrive VCE 15:05. Collect hire car — drive ~1.5 hrs to Lake Garda.
stops.maps_query: Venice Marco Polo Airport VCE Italy

eating.name: TBD — dinner near hotel on arrival

notes: Flight: BA LHR 11:50 → VCE 15:05. BA Groups booking.
Drive from Venice Marco Polo to south Lake Garda (Desenzano/Sirmione) is ~1.5 hrs via A4 motorway.
Drive to north lake (Riva del Garda) is ~2.5 hrs. Allow time after a full travel day.

days.title: Sirmione & South Lake

stops.name: Sirmione Peninsula
stops.detail: Narrow medieval peninsula jutting into the lake. Walk the old town walls and lakeside promenade.

stops.name: Scaligero Castle
stops.detail: Well-preserved 13th-century moated castle with views over the lake.

stops.name: Lazise
stops.detail: Charming walled village on the east shore. Lakeside walk and piazza cafés.

eating.name: TBD — evening in Lazise or local

notes: Sirmione is very busy in August/September — arrive early (before 10am) to beat crowds.
Parking outside the old town gates; the centro storico is mostly pedestrianised.

days.title: Malcesine & Monte Baldo Cable Car

stops.name: Malcesine Old Town
stops.detail: Prettiest village on the east shore. Castello Scaligero overlooks the lake. Narrow car-free alleys and lakeside cafés.

stops.name: Monte Baldo Cable Car
stops.detail: Rotating cable car to 1,760m. Panoramic views over the lake and Alps. Book in advance for September.

notes: Book cable car tickets in advance — very busy in summer.
Malcesine is very popular — park at the edge of town and walk in.

days.title: Riva del Garda — North Lake

stops.name: Riva del Garda
stops.detail: Dramatic northern tip of the lake, hemmed in by cliffs. Piazza III Novembre, lakeside promenade, the Rocca fortress.

stops.name: Arco Castle
stops.detail: Ruined medieval castle perched above the town. Short steep walk up — stunning views.

eating.name: TBD — Riva del Garda piazza restaurant

notes: Riva del Garda is the windsurf and kiteboard capital of the lake — lively atmosphere.
The drive north along the east shore (SS249) is very scenic.

days.title: Limone sul Garda — West Shore

stops.name: Limone sul Garda
stops.detail: Tiny lemon-grove village clinging to steep cliffs on the west shore. Terraced citrus gardens, colourful harbour, narrow lanes.

stops.name: Gargnano
stops.detail: Quiet, authentic lakeside town — less touristy than most. Beautiful Art Nouveau villa gardens (Villa Feltrinelli).

notes: West shore road (SS45bis) is narrow and twisty — allow extra time.
Limone gets very busy in summer — park early.

days.title: Lake Day — Swimming & Relaxation

stops.name: TBD — Lake Swimming / Lido
stops.detail: Relax day. Find a beach lido or public access point for swimming in the lake.

stops.name: Bardolino
stops.detail: Charming wine town on the east shore. Famous for its Bardolino DOC red wine. Good piazza and lakefront.

notes: Flexible day — use for anything missed earlier in the week.
Bardolino wine tasting is a great late afternoon option.

days.title: Verona Day Trip

stops.name: Verona Old Town
stops.detail: UNESCO World Heritage city. Piazza Bra, the Arena amphitheatre, Piazza delle Erbe, Juliet's Balcony, Castelvecchio.

stops.name: Verona Arena
stops.detail: One of the best-preserved Roman amphitheatres in the world. Inside access ~€10pp.

eating.name: TBD — last night dinner at hotel or local

notes: Last full day — pack bags in the evening ready for early departure tomorrow.
Verona is ~45 mins from most Lake Garda locations. Parking at Piazzale Cittadella or Park&Ride.

days.title: Return — Fly Venice to Heathrow

stops.name: Venice Marco Polo Airport (VCE)
stops.detail: Return hire car, check in. Flight VCE 14:20 → LHR 15:45 (BA Groups). Allow 2.5 hrs before departure for hire car return + check-in.
stops.maps_query: Venice Marco Polo Airport VCE Italy

notes: Flight: BA VCE 14:20 → LHR 15:45. BA Groups booking.
Allow 2.5 hrs before departure — depart hotel by ~10:00 to allow for drive (~1.5 hrs) and hire car return.
Check out of hotel on morning of 7 Sep.

bookings_required.notes: Outbound: 31 Aug LHR 11:50 → VCE 15:05. Inbound: 7 Sep VCE 14:20 → LHR 15:45. Mr & Mrs David Castledine.

bookings_required.item: Hotel Europa 4* — Superior Double Lake View (7 nights)
bookings_required.notes: Check-in 31 Aug 2026, check-out 7 Sep 2026. Mr & Mrs David Castledine.

bookings_required.item: Hire Car — Venice Marco Polo Airport (VCE)
bookings_required.notes: Pick up 31 Aug after 15:05 arrival. Return morning of 7 Sep. Estate or large saloon.
Book in advance for September. Day 3 (2 Sep).
Day 7 (6 Sep). Optional — can queue on the day but pre-booking saves time.
